headline: Built for Ascendo
subheadline: Tailored AI sales infrastructure to optimize talent recruitment and generative CRM workflows for your small team.

challenges.title: Talent Shortages
challenges.desc: Ascendo's small team struggles with hiring AI experts amid a 12.9% employee decline. This limits expansion in generative CRM solutions. Recruiting for global operations in Palo Alto and India adds complexity.

challenges.title: Retention Issues
challenges.desc: With only 11 employees, Ascendo faces high turnover in specialized roles. This disrupts CRM co-pilot development and knowledge management. Retaining talent is key to maintaining service workflows.

challenges.title: Workflow Inefficiencies
challenges.desc: Ascendo's AI agents handle 1800 workflows but lack integration. This causes delays in anomaly detection and backlog management. Streamlining is essential for proactive service operations.

challenges.title: Expansion Barriers
challenges.desc: Growing generative CRM solutions requires more staff in Continental Europe. Ascendo's funding and team size hinder global scaling. Strategic hires are needed to support Palo Alto and India teams.

deliverables.title: Talent AI Pipeline
deliverables.desc: Builds a recruitment system using AI to source and qualify candidates, integrating with Ascendo's CRM for seamless hiring tracking.

deliverables.title: CRM Workflow Optimizer
deliverables.desc: Creates automated workflows for Ascendo's AI agents, integrating with existing tools to reduce resolution times and escalations.

deliverables.title: Retention Analytics Hub
deliverables.desc: Develops a dashboard to analyze employee data and predict turnover, integrating with HR systems to inform retention strategies.

deliverables.title: Global Scaling Framework
deliverables.desc: Establishes a scalable infrastructure for team expansion, integrating with Ascendo's operations in multiple regions to support growth.

engagementSteps.title: Assessment Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Review Ascendo's current sales infrastructure and identify key pain points in talent and CRM workflows.

engagementSteps.title: Design and Build
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Develop customized AI solutions and integrate them with Ascendo's existing systems for immediate impact.

engagementSteps.title: Implementation and Optimization
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Launch the new infrastructure and refine based on feedback to ensure smooth operations.

faqItems.question: What is AI sales infrastructure?
faqItems.answer: It is a system that automates sales processes using AI tools.

faqItems.question: How does it integrate with CRM?
faqItems.answer: It connects directly with Ascendo's generative CRM to enhance workflows.

faqItems.question: Will this help with hiring?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it streamlines talent recruitment for Ascendo's AI roles.

faqItems.question: What is the cost?
faqItems.answer: Costs vary based on Ascendo's specific needs and scale.

faqItems.question: Is it customizable?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it is tailored to Ascendo's business challenges.

stackItems.name: Google Cloud
stackItems.role: Hosts AI agents and supports production workflows

stackItems.name: CRM Software
stackItems.role: Manages customer interactions and data integration

stackItems.name: Data Analytics
stackItems.role: Provides insights for retention and scaling
